name: Mirror Abyss / 镜渊
validation: ES Module parse/import, route snapshot guards, per-profile transport lanes, dual-channel diagnostics, deployment syntax/version and ZIP integrity checks passed
limitations: Original TypeScript project, package manifest and full source test suite were not present in the uploaded deploy archive.
fixes: formalize current-chat connection and named Connection Profile as the only two model routes
call named profiles directly by profile ID without switching the global SillyTavern connection
freeze and verify a safe Profile route fingerprint before every queued request
separate native requests into per-profile lanes so different models can progress independently while duplicate calls to one Profile remain ordered
add current-vs-Profile comparison diagnostics to distinguish Profile state faults from shared upstream faults
never silently fall back from a failed selected Profile to another model
preserve history rebuild recovery, admission, event memory and lorebook consistency behavior
